title: aster modestus var. major
intro: Aster modestus var. major, also known as the white or purple aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. It is believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
